page_metadata.bioconda__summary: ANANSE: ANalysis Algorithm for Networks Specified by Enhancers - Prediction of key transcription factors in cell fate determination using enhancer networks
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Ananse: analysis algorithm for networks specified by enhancers - prediction of key transcription factors in cell fate determination using enhancer networks
page_metadata.biotools__summary: ANANSE is a computational approach to infer enhancer-based gene regulatory networks (GRNs) and to use these GRNs to identify the key transcription factors in cell fate determination.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: ANANSE is a computational approach to infer enhancer-based gene regulatory networks (GRNs) and to use these GRNs to identify the key transcription factors in cell fate determination.
